name: codie
description: Codie is your interactive coding assistant.

codie.general.placeholder.description: Placeholder for general settings. Replace or extend as needed.

codie.foundry.serviceUrl.description: Override the Foundry Local service URL (e.g. http://localhost:60244). If set, this will be used for all Foundry Local operations.

codie.providers.foundry.maxTokens.description: Maximum number of tokens for Foundry Local AI responses.

codie.providers.ollama.maxTokens.description: Maximum number of tokens for Ollama AI responses.

codie.providers.lmstudio.maxTokens.description: Maximum number of tokens for LM Studio AI responses.

codie.providers.lmstudio.endpoint.description: LM Studio API endpoint URI (default: http://localhost:1234/v1)

codie.providers.foundry.exePath.description: Path to the Foundry executable. Leave blank to use the default in PATH.

codie.tools.mcp.endpoint.description: MCP tool server endpoint URI (default: http://localhost:3333)

codie.tools.mcp.apiKey.description: Context7 MCP API key for authenticating with the MCP tool server.

codie.tools.context7.apiKey.description: Context7 API key for authenticating with the Context7 MCP tool server. Use this for Context7 connections only.

codie.tools.changes.enabled.description: Enable the 'changes' tool (Get diffs of changed files)

codie.tools.codebase.enabled.description: Enable the 'codebase' tool (Find relevant file chunks, symbols, and codebase info)

codie.tools.editFiles.enabled.description: Enable the 'editFiles' tool (Edit files in your workspace)

codie.tools.extensi.enabled.description: Enable the 'extensi' tool (VS Code Extensions Marketplace integration)

codie.tools.fetch.enabled.description: Enable the 'fetch' tool (Fetch the main content from a web page)

codie.tools.findTestFiles.enabled.description: Enable the 'findTestFiles' tool (Find test files for a given source or test file)

codie.tools.githubRepo.enabled.description: Enable the 'githubRepo' tool (Search a GitHub repository for code snippets)

codie.tools.new.enabled.description: Enable the 'new' tool (Scaffold a new workspace with VS Code configs)

codie.tools.openSimpleBrowser.enabled.description: Enable the 'openSimpleBrowser' tool (Preview a locally hosted website)

codie.tools.problems.enabled.description: Enable the 'problems' tool (Check errors for a particular file)

codie.tools.runCommands.enabled.description: Enable the 'runCommands' tool (Run commands in the terminal)

codie.tools.runTasks.enabled.description: Enable the 'runTasks' tool (Run tasks and get their output)

codie.tools.search.enabled.description: Enable the 'search' tool (Search and read files in your workspace)

codie.tools.searchResults.enabled.description: Enable the 'searchResults' tool (Get results from the search view)

codie.tools.terminalLastCommand.enabled.description: Enable the 'terminalLastCommand' tool (Get the last command run in the terminal)

codie.tools.terminalSelection.enabled.description: Enable the 'terminalSelection' tool (Get the current selection in the terminal)

codie.tools.testFailure.enabled.description: Enable the 'testFailure' tool (Get info about the last unit test failure)

codie.tools.think.enabled.description: Enable the 'think' tool (Deep thinking and task organization)

codie.tools.todos.enabled.description: Enable the 'todos' tool (Manage and track todo items)

codie.tools.vscodeAPI.enabled.description: Enable the 'vscodeAPI' tool (VS Code API reference and documentation)

codie.permissions.placeholder.description: Placeholder permission setting. Replace or extend as needed.

commands.title: Manage Codie Tools
commands.description: Enable or disable Codie developer tools

commands.title: Test Foundry Local Connection
commands.description: Test connectivity to Foundry Local and list available models.
